calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Continued To Jan-11-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-08-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Robert Mack, Esq. 415-392-8920 Kurlander Burton & Mack for Plaintiff.
Steven Hepps, Esq. 781-332-7166 Law Offices of Lelian H. Maximous for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Mr. Mack poses a question the court re self-represented litigants. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Law Offices of Lelian H. Maximous, Atty. Steven Hepps Motion to be Relieved as counsel for Defendant Pete Pandit, AV Guys, Inc.

The unopposed motion by Counsel Steven M. Hepps and Law Offices of Lelian H. Maximous, counsel for AV Guys, Inc., to be relieved as counsel is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the motion is granted.

No later than the time set for hearing, Moving Parties must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org an updated proposed order on MC-053 with accurate information inserted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-30-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
